mlp_random_weights.description: MLP [66->16->1] with Gaussian(0, 0.1) weights, no heuristic

mlp_positional_eval.description: MLP + positional evaluation (captures 2x, center control, development, check bonus, king safety) + T=0.5 softmax

mlp_reinforce_trained.description: MLP + positional eval + post-game REINFORCE weight updates
mlp_reinforce_trained.note: Rating improves with each game played against human

notes: Ratings are rough estimates based on theoretical analysis and observed behavior
Actual ELO would require many games against calibrated opponents
JS engine now supports castling and en passant; CJC backend remains simplified
Post-game REINFORCE training causes agent to improve over time
Temperature=0.5 softmax makes agent play more aggressively (greedier move selection)
All agents are deterministic for a given seed
